data.body: 4e9d held-out TDD: authored 3 happy-path + 11 held-out tests. Discovered unit-conftest sets REBAR_COMPACTION_HORIZON_NS=0 (auto-folds events to SNAPSHOT) -> composer tests set huge horizon to keep raw events inspectable; compact tests force horizon=0+threshold=1. Fixed test API bugs (delete is CLI-only; rebuild_snapshot_from_full_log needs ticket_dir). All RED for right reasons (author_email/author_id missing). Held out oracle. Dispatching implementer w/ happy-path only + folded advisories (compact repo_root from tracker; _reset_attribution_cache helper; git timeout 5s; per-entry surfacing).
